description_long: This is a compact, submachine gun-style rifle with a matte black finish and a distinctive wireframe folding stock. The receiver is rectangular and robust, with a prominent magazine well that accommodates a detachable box magazine. The barrel is relatively short and slender, ending with a simple muzzle, and the handguard area is minimal, emphasizing portability. The pistol grip is ergonomic and slightly angled, designed for rapid handling in close-quarters urban environments. Iron sights are integrated into the top of the receiver, providing basic aiming capability. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing function and ease of use in confined spaces.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun-style rifle with a wireframe folding stock, detachable box magazine, and integrated iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, wireframe folding stock, pistol grip, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, iron sights, and the width of the receiver and magazine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the folding stock, magazine, and the overall slim profile of the rifle.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the wireframe stock and the back of the receiver and grip.
